## Automated Tests Required

### SL-007 ‚Äî Quicksave (F5) / Quickload (F9) + InputContext gating ‚Äî Integration
**Test file path**: `tests/integration/foundation/save_load_quicksave_test.gd`
**What to test** (10 ACs):
- AC-1: F5 in GAMEPLAY context fires `save_to_slot(0, sg)`; `Events.game_saved` + `Events.hud_toast_requested` (`&"quicksave_success"`) emit
- AC-2: F5 in CUTSCENE = silent no-op (zero signals, zero file mutations)
- AC-3/4/5: F5 in DOCUMENT_OVERLAY / MODAL / LOADING = silent no-op (per CR-6 extension)
- AC-6: F9 with `slot_exists(0) == false` emits `&"quicksave_unavailable"` toast; no load
- AC-7: F9 with `slot_exists(0) == true` fires `load_from_slot(0)`; `Events.game_loaded` emits
- AC-8: F5 debounce ‚Äî successful F5 at t=0; t=300ms drops; t=600ms fires (exactly 2 emits total)
- AC-9: SaveLoadService `_ready()` body contains zero `InputContext` references (grep AC)
- AC-10: F5 during in-flight save defers to SL-008 state machine (no double-write race)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- F5 fires in transition window between CUTSCENE and GAMEPLAY (first F5 drops; second after pop fires)
- Failed F5 (InputContext blocked) does NOT update `_last_quicksave_msec` ‚Äî debounce only on success
- `slot_0_meta.cfg` exists but `slot_0.res` missing ‚Üí `slot_exists(0)` correctly returns false
- Corrupt `slot_0.res` ‚Üí F9 surfaces `save_failed(CORRUPT_FILE)` from SL-003; F9 does not retry

**Estimated test count**: ~10 integration tests (one per AC + 2-3 edge-case sub-tests)

### SL-008 ‚Äî Sequential save queueing state machine ‚Äî Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/save_load_state_machine_test.gd`
**What to test** (10 ACs):
- AC-1: `current_state` defaults to `IDLE` on `_ready()`; read-only public property
- AC-2: IDLE ‚Üí SAVING ‚Üí IDLE state-spy log on `save_to_slot(0, sg)` success path
- AC-3/4: Concurrent saves queue sequentially; FIFO order preserved (slot 0 then slot 3, not LIFO)
- AC-5: LOADING blocks save ‚Üí save queues ‚Üí load completes ‚Üí save processes (LOADING ‚Üí IDLE ‚Üí SAVING)
- AC-6: Concurrent loads queue sequentially (matches save case)
- AC-7: Autosave + F5 same-frame both complete; both targeting slot 0 ‚Üí LATTER wins (per GDD edge case)
- AC-8: Queue depth limit `MAX_QUEUE_DEPTH = 4`; 5th op returns `false` immediately + `push_warning`
- AC-9: Public methods (`save_to_slot`, `load_from_slot`) sole entry points to queue (code-review grep)
- AC-10: State returns to IDLE BEFORE `Events.save_failed.emit` on failure path (subscriber retry safety)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- Re-entrance: `game_saved` signal handler calls `save_to_slot` again (queue catches it)
- Failed save ‚Üí state returns to IDLE before failure emit
- `MAX_QUEUE_DEPTH` boundary exactly 4 (4th op accepted; 5th rejected)

**Estimated test count**: ~10 unit tests

### SL-009 ‚Äî Anti-pattern fences + registry entries + lint guards ‚Äî Config/Data
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/foundation/save_load_anti_pattern_lint_test.gd`
**What to test** (8 ACs):
- AC-1/2/3: `docs/registry/architecture.yaml` has 3 `forbidden_patterns` rows (`save_service_assembles_state` HIGH, `save_state_uses_node_references` HIGH, `forgotten_duplicate_deep_on_load` MEDIUM) with required fields
- AC-4 Pattern 1 lint: greps `save_load_service.gd` for forbidden gameplay class names (PlayerCharacter, StealthAI, CivilianAI, Inventory, Combat, MissionLevelScripting, FailureRespawn, DocumentCollection); zero matches in non-comment source
- AC-4 Pattern 2 lint: regex-searches `src/core/save_load/states/*.gd` for `@export var X: NodePath` or `@export var X: Node`; zero matches
- AC-4 Pattern 3 lint: registry-existence assertion (caller-side lint deferred until callers ship in MLS/F&R)
- AC-5: AC-24/AC-25 from GDD enforced by patterns 1+2
- AC-6: lint failure messages identify pattern name, file:line, ADR cite, refactor hint
- AC-7: lint runs in standard `tests/gdunit4_runner.gd` discovery; non-zero exit blocks CI
- AC-8: registry entries cross-reference `docs/architecture/control-manifest.md` lines 88-90

**Edge cases**:
- Class name in comment ‚Üí comment-stripped grep ignores it
- Default-valued `@export var X: NodePath = NodePath()` still caught by regex
- Subclass `@export var nodes: Array[Node]` also caught

**Estimated test count**: 3-4 lint tests (one per pattern + cross-reference verifier)

### FR-001 ‚Äî FailureRespawn autoload scaffold ‚Äî Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/failure_respawn/failure_respawn_service_scaffold_test.gd`
**What to test** (8 ACs):
- AC-1: class declarations (`FailureRespawnService extends Node`), inner `enum FlowState { IDLE, CAPTURING, RESTORING }`, fields `_flow_state: FlowState = IDLE`, `_current_checkpoint: Checkpoint = null`
- AC-2: `_ready()` connects to `Events.player_died` + `Events.section_entered`; `_exit_tree()` disconnects with `is_connected` guards
- AC-3: `_ready()` calls `LevelStreamingService.register_restore_callback(_on_ls_restore)` unconditionally (replace-semantics for hot-reload ‚Äî GDD E.24)
- AC-4: post-`_ready()` state is IDLE + checkpoint null (boot without section, GDD E.23)
- AC-5: IDLE ‚Üí CAPTURING transition synchronous within same call stack on `Events.player_died`
- AC-6/7: CR-2 idempotency ‚Äî second `player_died` during CAPTURING/RESTORING is a no-op (state preserved)
- AC-8: `project.godot [autoload]` line 8 = `FailureRespawn="*res://src/gameplay/failure_respawn/failure_respawn_service.gd"` (after Combat line 7, before MLS line 9)

**Edge cases**:
- Boot without section ‚Üí no crash, IDLE + null preserved
- `_init()` body must contain zero autoload references (ADR-0007 IG 3 grep AC)

**Estimated test count**: ~8 unit tests + 1 grep AC

### FR-002 ‚Äî Slot-0 autosave assembly via MLS-owned capture() chain ‚Äî Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/failure_respawn/failure_respawn_capturing_test.gd`
**What to test** (7 ACs):
- AC-1: CAPTURING body calls `SaveLoadService.save_to_slot(0, assembled)` exactly once; passes SAME object reference to `LevelStreamingService.reload_current_section(assembled)` (identity check ‚Äî not value equality)
- AC-2: `save_to_slot` returns IO_ERROR ‚Üí in-memory SaveGame still passes to `reload_current_section` (respawn NOT aborted); `push_error` logged; transitions to RESTORING
- AC-3: `FailureRespawnState extends Resource` declaration in `src/core/save_load/states/failure_respawn_state.gd` with `floor_applied_this_checkpoint: bool = false` + `_init(flag: bool = false)` constructor
- AC-4: `FailureRespawnState.capture(live_flag)` returns new instance with `floor_applied_this_checkpoint == live_flag` (mirror; does NOT advance live)
- AC-5: assembled SaveGame's `failure_respawn` is non-null; matches live `_floor_applied_this_checkpoint` at capture time (VS path always false)
- AC-6: grep lint ‚Äî zero `await` between `save_to_slot` and `reload_current_section` calls
- AC-7: state transitions CAPTURING ‚Üí RESTORING after `reload_current_section` returns

**Edge cases**:
- Save returns IO_ERROR ‚Üí respawn proceeds anyway (in-memory handoff is the load-bearing path)
- Mock LS double tracks call order + payload identity

**Estimated test count**: ~7 unit tests

### FR-003 ‚Äî respawn_triggered signal emission ordering contract ‚Äî Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/failure_respawn/respawn_triggered_ordering_test.gd`
**What to test** (6 ACs):
- AC-1: ordering spy verifies `Events.respawn_triggered.emit(section_id)` fires at sequence index N; `LevelStreamingService.reload_current_section` fires at index N+1 (signal BEFORE reload)
- AC-2: no subscriber connected ‚Üí flow completes to RESTORING without error or `push_error`
- AC-3: subscriber that calls `push_error("test-error")` ‚Üí F&R continues to call `reload_current_section`; state progresses to RESTORING (soft-error path; hard-exception branch deferred per OQ-FR-8)
- AC-4: project-wide grep for `respawn_triggered\.emit\b` matches ONLY `failure_respawn_service.gd` (sole-publisher per ADR-0002:183)
- AC-5: emitted `section_id` matches current active section at moment of death (StringName, not future or past section)
- AC-6: SCRIPTED death path emits non-empty `StringName` section_id (no `&""`)

**Edge cases**:
- Boot without section preload ‚Üí AC-6 guard prevents empty-string emit
- Multiple subscribers ‚Äî ordering between handlers (Godot 4.6 connect-order delivery)

**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests + 1 project-wide grep AC

### FR-004 ‚Äî Plaza checkpoint assembly + CR-7 IDLE guard ‚Äî Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/failure_respawn/section_entered_handler_test.gd`
**What to test** (8 ACs):
- AC-1: section with `Marker3D` named `"player_respawn_point"` at `(10.0, 0.5, -5.0)`; section_entered(FORWARD) + IDLE ‚Üí `_current_checkpoint.respawn_position` within 0.01m of marker
- AC-2: missing marker ‚Üí `push_error` AND `_current_checkpoint` retains previous value (NOT overwritten with null)
- AC-3: IDLE + FORWARD ‚Üí live `_floor_applied_this_checkpoint` resets to `false`
- AC-4: `_floor_applied_this_checkpoint == true` + RESPAWN ‚Üí flag remains `true` (anti-farm)
- AC-5: RESTORING + FORWARD (queued-respawn scenario) ‚Üí `_current_checkpoint` NOT overwritten; flag NOT reset (CR-7 IDLE guard)
- AC-6: IDLE + unrecognized `TransitionReason` ‚Üí `push_warning`; live flag preserved (conservative default)
- AC-7: NEW_GAME (IDLE) = same behavior as FORWARD (assemble + reset flag)
- AC-8: `_current_section_id` updated on FORWARD/NEW_GAME/LOAD_FROM_SAVE when IDLE

**Edge cases**:
- `current_scene == null` ‚Üí `push_error` and graceful return
- Marker is wrong type (not `Marker3D`) ‚Üí `push_error`

**Estimated test count**: ~8 unit tests

### FR-005 ‚Äî LS step-9 restore callback + reset_for_respawn + InputContext push/pop ‚Äî Integration
**Test file path**: `tests/integration/feature/failure_respawn/respawn_beat_end_to_end_test.gd`
**What to test** (9 ACs):
- AC-1: InputContext stack `[GAMEPLAY]` before death ‚Üí full flow ‚Üí `[GAMEPLAY]` after IDLE (net-zero)
- AC-2: `LOADING` active during respawn window ‚Üí `ui_pause` action does NOT route to pause handler
- AC-3: step-9 callback with `_floor_applied_this_checkpoint == false` ‚Üí `Inventory.apply_respawn_floor_if_needed(snapshot, true)` called; live flag advances to `true` synchronously after return
- AC-4: RESTORING + section_entered(RESPAWN) ‚Üí `PlayerCharacter.reset_for_respawn(_current_checkpoint)` called; `_current_checkpoint` NOT overwritten; flag NOT reset (CR-7)
- AC-5: After `reset_for_respawn` returns ‚Üí `InputContext.LOADING` popped; state transitions to IDLE
- AC-6: Editor hot-reload ‚Äî fresh F&R instance re-registers restore callback unconditionally (no duplicate from old instance)
- AC-7: RESTORING > 2.5s without step-9 firing ‚Üí `push_error` watchdog (CR-10)
- **AC-8 [Integration]**: VS scenario ‚Äî Plaza section loaded; `Events.player_died(SCRIPTED)` fires ‚Üí assert (a) slot-0 SaveGame assembled, (b) `respawn_triggered(&"plaza")` emitted, (c) LS `reload_current_section` called, (d) step-9 callback fires + `Inventory.apply_respawn_floor_if_needed` called (no-op in VS), (e) `PlayerCharacter.reset_for_respawn` called with Plaza checkpoint, (f) `_flow_state == IDLE` post-flow
- **AC-9 [Visual/Feel]**: Manual evidence ‚Äî caught-by-Plaza-guard ‚Üí 2.0s Audio fade-out ‚Üí respawn at Plaza checkpoint ‚Üí audio cut-to-silence + fade-in ‚Üí Eve back on her feet, mission state intact

**Edge cases**:
- `_current_checkpoint == null` at step 9 (E.9 / OQ-FR-5) ‚Üí `reset_for_respawn(null)` + `push_warning`; PC GDD governs null behavior
- Multiple deaths in same checkpoint window ‚Äî flag-state preserved across re-deaths

**Estimated test count**: ~7 integration tests (AC-1..7) + 1 round-trip end-to-end (AC-8) + 1 manual evidence doc (AC-9)

### FR-006 ‚Äî Anti-pattern fences (FR domain) ‚Äî Config/Data
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/failure_respawn/fr_anti_pattern_lint_test.gd` + 3 CI shell scripts in `tools/ci/`
**What to test** (7 ACs):
- AC-1: grep `failure_respawn_service.gd` for forbidden non-dependencies (PlayerCharacter, StealthAI, GuardFireController, HUDCore, DocumentCollection, CivilianAI, CutsceneSystem) ‚Äî zero matches
- AC-2: grep for `await` between `save_to_slot` and `reload_current_section` ‚Äî zero matches (CR-4)
- AC-3: project-wide grep for `respawn_triggered\.emit\b` ‚Üí only `failure_respawn_service.gd` matches (sole-publisher; AC-FR-12.4); enforced by `tools/ci/lint_respawn_triggered_sole_publisher.sh`
- AC-4: subscriber re-entrancy ‚Äî grep `_on_respawn_triggered*` handler bodies in Combat/StealthAI/Audio for `LevelStreamingService.` calls or `Events\..*\.emit` ‚Äî zero matches; enforced by `tools/ci/lint_respawn_triggered_no_reentrancy.sh`
- AC-5: step-9 callback `_on_ls_restore` body ‚Äî grep for `SaveLoadService.save_to_slot` or `save_to_slot(0` ‚Äî zero matches (`fr_autosaving_on_respawn` forbidden pattern)
- AC-6: registry entry `fr_autosaving_on_respawn` in `docs/registry/architecture.yaml` with required fields + `enforced_by: tools/ci/lint_fr_autosaving_on_respawn.sh`
- AC-7: 3 lint scripts exist + executable + return 0 on clean repo + 1 on synthetic violation

**Edge cases**:
- Synthetic violation injected then removed (tested in CI dry-run)
- Comment containing pattern ‚Üí comment-stripped grep ignores

**Estimated test count**: ~7 lint tests + 3 CI shell scripts

### MLS-001 ‚Äî MissionLevelScripting autoload scaffold ‚Äî Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/mission_level_scripting/mls_scaffold_test.gd`
**What to test** (6 ACs):
- AC-1: `mission_level_scripting.gd` exists; declares `class_name MissionLevelScriptingService extends Node`; doc comment present
- AC-2: `project.godot [autoload]` line 9 = `MissionLevelScripting="*res://src/gameplay/mission_level_scripting/mission_level_scripting.gd"` (after FailureRespawn line 8, before SettingsService line 10)
- AC-3 (AC-MLS-12.2): `_init()` zero references to `Events`, `FailureRespawn`, `SaveLoad`, any autoload; zero `get_node()`; zero `Events.*` lookups
- AC-4: `_ready()` connects to `Events.section_entered` + `Events.respawn_triggered` via typed `signal.connect(callable)` syntax (not string-based)
- AC-5: `_exit_tree()` disconnects with `is_connected` guard (ADR-0002 IG 3)
- AC-6 (AC-MLS-12.1): on game init, MLS in scene tree AFTER FailureRespawn (load-order invariant)

**Edge cases**:
- Editor hot-reload ‚Äî clean disconnect on `_exit_tree()`

**Estimated test count**: ~6 unit tests

### MLS-002 ‚Äî Mission state machine + 4 signal declarations ‚Äî Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/mission_level_scripting/mission_state_machine_test.gd`
**What to test** (16 ACs):
- AC-MLS-1.1..1.4: mission state machine ‚Äî IDLE ‚Üí RUNNING (NEW_GAME) ‚Üí COMPLETED (F.1 satisfied); duplicate NEW_GAME drops; late `objective_completed` after COMPLETED is no-op
- AC-MLS-2.1..2.4: objective state machine ‚Äî F.2 prereq evaluation (`prereq_objective_ids`); ACTIVE on `mission_started`; cascade activation; idempotent late-completion drop
- AC-MLS-2.5: F.1 only counts `required_for_completion = true` objectives
- AC-MLS-2.6: prereq cycle detection at CR-18 ‚Äî `push_error` and stay IDLE
- AC-MLS-2.7: empty/all-optional `MissionResource` ‚Äî `push_error` and stay IDLE
- AC-MLS-3.1..3.3: FP-1 (waypoint) + FP-2 (objective marker) grep-CI fences
- AC-MLS-12.1: `_ready()` load-order correctness (no null-ref crash)
- AC-MLS-13.1..13.4: MissionObjective `.tres` load + supersede cascade depth ‚â§ `SUPERSEDE_CASCADE_MAX = 3`; self-supersede `push_error`

**Edge cases**:
- Supersede cascade exactly at depth 3 (boundary)
- `MissionObjective` with empty `prereq_objective_ids` (vacuously activates)

**Estimated test count**: ~16 unit tests

### MLS-003 ‚Äî Plaza section authoring contract + CI validation ‚Äî Logic
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/feature/mission_level_scripting/section_authoring_contract_test.gd` + `tools/ci/lint_section_authoring.sh`
**What to test** (8 ACs):
- AC-MLS-6.1: CI `find_child("player_respawn_point", true, false)` against Plaza scene exits 1 if missing, 0 otherwise
- AC-MLS-6.2: distinct-instance check ‚Äî `entry_point != respawn_point` NodePaths
- AC-MLS-6.3: `section_id` StringName validated against `section_registry.tres`
- AC-MLS-6.4: `actor_id` uniqueness across CharacterBody3D nodes in same section
- AC-MLS-6.5: passivity grep ‚Äî `emit_signal` or `*.emit(` inside `_ready()`/`_enter_tree()` of section script ‚Üí fail
- AC-MLS-6.6: forbidden node names (`kill_cam_main`, `ObjectiveMarker_*`, `MinimapIcon_*`) ‚Üí fail
- AC-MLS-14.4: `discovery_surface_ids: Array[StringName]` length ‚â• 1 on section root
- AC-MLS-7.4: Plaza contains zero `gadget_mission_pickup` items + exactly 1 document `WorldItem`

**Edge cases**:

**Estimated test count**: ~8 unit tests + 1 CI shell script

### MLS-004 ‚Äî SaveGame assembler chain ‚Äî FORWARD autosave gate ‚Äî Integration
**Test file path**: `tests/integration/feature/mission_level_scripting/savegame_assembler_test.gd`
**What to test** (8 ACs):
- AC-MLS-8.1: section_entered(FORWARD) + RUNNING ‚Üí 6 `capture()` calls synchronously + `save_to_slot(0, assembled)` exactly once; no `await`, no `call_deferred`
- AC-MLS-8.2: section_entered(RESPAWN) ‚Üí `save_to_slot` call count == 0 (autosave gated OFF)
- AC-MLS-8.3: FP-6 grep against `src/gameplay/mission/save_assembly*` for `\b(await|call_deferred)\b` ‚Äî zero matches
- AC-MLS-8.4: mid-FORWARD + `respawn_triggered` from F&R ‚Üí no interleaving (GDScript single-threaded)
- AC-MLS-8.5: any `capture()` returns null ‚Üí `Events.save_failed(IO_ERROR)` + `save_to_slot` aborted
- AC-MLS-11.1: LOAD_FROM_SAVE ‚Üí no `objective_started` re-emit; `mission_started` suppressed; states restored silently
- AC-MLS-11.2: `get_active_objectives()` returns IDs in restored ACTIVE state
- AC-MLS-11.3: `disarm_bomb` ACTIVE in save ‚Üí no briefing-bark signal on load
- AC-MLS-14.5: `t_assemble_total ‚â§ 21 ms p95` on minimum HDD profile (perf evidence required)
- AC-MLS-12.3: FP-4 static-analysis lint ‚Äî `save_to_slot.*RESPAWN|RESPAWN.*save_to_slot` pattern blocked

**Edge cases**:
- Missing capture method (one of the 6 owning systems hasn't shipped yet) ‚Äî stub behavior
- Atomic write: tmp filename ends in `.res` (not `.tmp` ‚Äî Sprint 01 finding F1)

**Estimated test count**: ~10 integration tests + 1 perf evidence doc + 1 CI lint

### MLS-005 ‚Äî Plaza objective integration ‚Äî full mission loop ‚Äî Integration
**Test file path**: `tests/integration/feature/mission_level_scripting/plaza_objective_integration_test.gd`
**What to test** (9 ACs):
- AC-MLS-4.1: `MLSTrigger` body_entered single-fire latch ‚Äî 6-step sequence (is_instance_valid ‚Üí is_in_group("player") ‚Üí trigger_id not in fired ‚Üí add ‚Üí set_deferred(monitoring=false) ‚Üí 2nd entry no-op)
- AC-MLS-4.2: FP-5 grep against `src/gameplay/mission/` for `body_exited` ‚Äî zero matches
- AC-MLS-4.3: trigger never fires (Jolt tunneling E.21) ‚Üí no `push_error`, beat silently missed (acceptable)
- AC-MLS-4.4: freed body `body_entered` (E.22) ‚Üí `is_instance_valid` guard fires; silently discarded
- AC-MLS-5.1: T1 beat in `fired_beats` + section_entered(RESPAWN) ‚Üí fired_beats restored from slot 0; `MLSTrigger.monitoring = false`; beat does not replay
- AC-MLS-5.5: T7 beat subscribed to FORWARD only ‚Üí does NOT fire on RESPAWN
- AC-MLS-9.1: full lifecycle ‚Äî NEW_GAME ‚Üí all 4 Mission-domain signals at correct moments; none skipped/reordered
- AC-MLS-9.2: code-review CI ‚Äî zero direct refs to HUD/Audio/Cutscenes/Dialogue in `src/gameplay/mission/`
- AC-MLS-9.3: VS-tier no-subscriber path ‚Äî MLS emits silently with no error/crash
- AC-MLS-9.4: integration playthrough ‚Äî `recover_plaza_document` fires on `document_collected`; Audio test proxy receives `objective_completed` (no direct MLS‚ÜíAudio call)
- AC-MLS-14.6: SAI propagation flips N‚â•2 guards same frame ‚Üí at most 1 T6 beat fires; remaining N-1 dropped
- AC-MLS-14.7: `triggers_fired: Dictionary[StringName, bool]` lookup is O(1); first guard after `is_instance_valid`

**Edge cases**:
- Player enters trigger volume before document_collected fires ‚Üí trigger latches; document still completes objective
- Section reload mid-objective ‚Üí `fired_beats` persisted via slot 0; restored correctly

**Estimated test count**: ~12 integration tests + 1 manual walkthrough doc

---

## Manual QA Checklist

### FR-005 AC-9 ‚Äî Respawn beat visual evidence ‚Äî Visual/Feel
**Verification method**: Screen recording or annotated screenshot of caught-by-Plaza-guard beat
**Who must sign off**: user / lead-programmer
**Evidence to capture**: `production/qa/evidence/sprint-05-respawn-beat-2026-05-XX.md` with embedded screenshot or video link

Checklist:
- [ ] Eve is caught by Plaza guard (state escalates to COMBAT per Sprint 04 stealth AI)
- [ ] `Events.player_died(SCRIPTED)` fires (verify via debug log or test hook)
- [ ] 2.0 s Audio fade-out engages BEFORE LS reload starts
- [ ] Eve respawns at Plaza `player_respawn_point` Marker3D world position
- [ ] Audio cut-to-silence followed by 2.0 s fade-in (Pillar 3 "house lights up between scenes")
- [ ] Mission state intact post-respawn ‚Äî Plaza objective still ACTIVE (not COMPLETED, not reset)
- [ ] Entire beat completes in ‚â§2.5 s perceived time (CR-13 timing target)
- [ ] No "You Died" screen, no full-mission reload, no tutorial quip (Pillar 3 forbidden patterns absent)

*Subjective "feel" note: the beat must read as theatrical reset, not punishment. If it feels like a punishment screen, surface to game-designer for tuning.*

### MLS-005 ‚Äî Full mission loop walkthrough ‚Äî Integration
**Verification method**: Manual walkthrough in Plaza VS demo
**Who must sign off**: user / lead-programmer
**Evidence to capture**: `production/qa/evidence/sprint-05-mission-loop-2026-05-XX.md` with step-by-step timing notes

Checklist:
- [ ] NEW_GAME ‚Üí `mission_started(&"eiffel_tower_recover_plaza")` emits
- [ ] `objective_started(&"recover_plaza_document")` emits within same frame
- [ ] Player navigates Plaza, encounters guard
- [ ] Caught-by-guard ‚Üí `player_died(SCRIPTED)` ‚Üí respawn_triggered ‚Üí reload ‚Üí step-9 restore ‚Üí reset_for_respawn
- [ ] Mission state intact post-respawn
- [ ] Player collects document ‚Üí `document_collected` fires
- [ ] `objective_completed(&"recover_plaza_document")` emits
- [ ] `mission_completed(&"eiffel_tower_recover_plaza")` emits (F.1 satisfied ‚Äî only required objective complete)
- [ ] No regressions in Sprint 04 stealth AI behavior (perception ‚Üí suspicion ‚Üí audio cue still functional)

---

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before any QA hand-off for Sprint 05:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash (725-test baseline + Sprint 05 additions all green)
2. NEW_GAME loads Plaza section; `mission_started` + `objective_started` fire
3. **F5 quicksave** writes slot 0 in GAMEPLAY context; HUD toast emits
4. **F5 quicksave during cutscene/modal/loading** is silent no-op (no save, no toast)
5. **F9 quickload** with empty slot 0 emits "No quicksave available" toast
6. **F9 quickload** with occupied slot 0 reloads section
7. **section_entered(FORWARD)** triggers MLS autosave to slot 0; tmp+rename atomic
8. **section_entered(RESPAWN)** does NOT autosave (FP-4 guard)
9. **Player death** in Plaza ‚Üí respawn_triggered emits BEFORE reload_current_section
10. **Step-9 restore callback** fires synchronously; `reset_for_respawn` called with checkpoint
11. **InputContext.LOADING** push at death / pop at IDLE ‚Äî net-zero stack
12. Save-load round-trip: pre-death state == post-respawn state (mission state intact)
13. Performance: `t_assemble_total ‚â§ 21 ms p95` on FORWARD autosave; respawn beat ‚â§2.5 s perceived
14. No frame drops in Plaza VS scene (60 fps target maintained)
15. CI lint scripts (sole-publisher, no-reentrancy, no-await-in-pipeline, FP-4, FP-5, FP-6) all pass

*Smoke tests are verified via `/smoke-check sprint`. Reference this list when running that skill.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

| Story | Playtest Goal | Min Sessions | Target Player Type |
|-------|--------------|--------------|-------------------|
| FR-005 | Does the respawn beat feel theatrical (Pillar 3 "house lights up") rather than punishing? | 1 (user) | Familiar with NOLF1 / spy-stealth genre |
| MLS-005 | Does the full mission loop read as coherent without HUD objective text? | 1 (user) | New player (no prior session knowledge) |

**Sign-off requirement**: Playtest notes for FR-005 + MLS-005 must be written to `production/qa/evidence/sprint-05-mission-loop-2026-05-XX.md` and reviewed by user before sprint close. If Plaza VS scene with baked NavigationMesh is not yet authored at sprint end (per Sprint 04 deferred follow-up), playtest sessions may be deferred to the first post-art sprint that has the scene authored.

*FR-005 + MLS-005 are the only stories warranting playtest; the other 12 are pure code-correctness.*

---

## Definition of Done ‚Äî This Sprint

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified ‚Äî via automated test result OR documented manual evidence (screenshot, video, or playtest notes with sign-off)
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for FR-005 AC-9 and MLS-005 walkthrough
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced (suite ‚â• 725 baseline + Sprint 05 additions)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)
- [ ] CI lint scripts (8 forbidden patterns: SL √ó 4 + FR √ó 3 + MLS √ó 4 + cross-cutting) all pass on clean repo and exit 1 on synthetic violation

---

## Cross-Cutting Risks

1. **`PlayerCharacter.reset_for_respawn(checkpoint)` does not yet exist** ‚Äî FR-005 implements it inline (per story title). Do NOT create a parallel PC-007 story unless FR-005 grows past its estimate.
2. **Plaza VS scene with baked NavigationMesh** ‚Äî Sprint 04 deferred carryover. MLS-003 + MLS-005 may use a stub Plaza scene if the real one is not authored by mid-sprint. Surface to user if MLS-005 acceptance requires real scene.
3. **`Inventory.apply_respawn_floor_if_needed` is a no-op in VS** (no ammo) ‚Äî FR-005 AC-3 still verifies the call happens; the math test is deferred to first Combat sprint.
4. **`document_collected` signal** ‚Äî MLS-005 AC-MLS-9.4 depends on this signal existing in the Document Collection epic's signal set. If not yet declared on `events.gd`, surface as a cross-epic block to the Signal Bus epic.
5. **ADR-0007 mission-vs-failure ordering** ‚Äî already amended once (2026-04-27). Hard stop if FR-002 or MLS-004 surface a contradiction.
